title: premna jalpaiguriana
intro: Premna jalpaiguriana, also known as the Himalayan Premna or Jalpaiguri Premna, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Premna jalpaiguriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-diabetic properties. Premna jalpaiguriana is used in various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin infections and gastrointestinal disorders.
